name: Hinata Shintani
description:
**Height:** 177 cm   
**Debut:** Chapter 21

He is Misaki-chan's childhood friend. He can eat anything and still be hungry. He works at a gas station. 

 ~!Misaki-chan is Hinata's first love since elementary school, which was when Misaki-chan didn't hate guys. Eventually, after winning the cake eating contest, he finds out that Misaki works in the maid cafe. !~
